# Matter-ready partition table for the E: # Pre-staged in Phase 1 so adding esp-matter later does not reshuffle flash: the
# 4 MB factory app has ample room for engine + BLE + Matter
# where esp-matter keeps its factory data (Matter DAC / cert provider). Today the
# Phase-1 bring-up app (~0.3 MB) sits in `factory` and the data partitions are
# empty. Offsets are left blank so ESP-IDF computes + aligns them (the factory app
# lands on the required 0x10000 boundary: 0x9000 + nvs 0x6000 + phy 0x1000 = 0x10000).
